field.name: product_tooltip

label.invisible: type != 'service' or service_policy != 'ordered_prepaid' or not sale_ok or service_tracking not in ['no', 'task_global_project', 'task_in_project', 'project_only']

div.invisible: type != 'service' or service_policy != 'ordered_prepaid' or not sale_ok or service_tracking not in ['no', 'task_global_project', 'task_in_project', 'project_only']

field.div:
Warn the salesperson for an upsell when work done exceeds
of hours sold.
